events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Scenario: residential job, flashing & WRB integration, observed field condition: tape sequence wrong at sill. Work rough-complete. Need identify component/condition and visible defect cues. Need decision fail because non-compliant. Risk? Water intrusion at sill can be high. Work stage rough-complete. component_conditions installed-defective, non-compliant. percent_complete maybe 80. value 0. sound_source empty? not asked. confidence 0.95. event_time 0, rate 0, order empty, workable empty. findings: tape sequence wrong at sill; WRB/flexible flashing tape installed in incorrect order; potential reverse lap/seam. actions: remove and reinstall tape in correct sequence per manufacturer; inspect surrounding WRB and flashing. rationale: at rough-complete, tape sequence at sill is wrong, creating reverse laps that allow water intrusion, violating IRC R703 and mfr instructions. references: IRC R703, manufacturer instructions. Need ensure JSON valid.
